exact.opposite_monotonicity: epsilon is decreasing and u^2 is increasing, hence Cov(epsilon(U),U^2)<=0
exact.splice: lambda=0 prefix ends at n=500; tail starts at n=501, k=n+3=504

proof_boundary: This artifact proves first-summand dominance uniformly for -100<=lambda<=0 and the resulting lambda-zero order-four perturbation budget. It does not prove the first-summand curvature ceiling, all-shift order-four positivity, forward order-four invariance, PF-infinity, RH, or Lambda<=0.
remaining_target: K_1(t)<=(7/2)/t^2 for every real t>=503 at lambda=0

rows.claim: The complete-to-first-summand relative moment tail is an expectation of the pointwise theta-tail ratio.
Differentiation in the nonnegative heat-penalty parameter is a covariance identity.
rows.proof_boundary: Exact differentiation identity for finite first-summand moments.

rows.claim: The decreasing theta-tail ratio and increasing square coordinate force the covariance to be nonpositive.
rows.formula: 2*Cov(f(U),g(U))=E[(f(U)-f(V))*(g(U)-g(V))]; epsilon is decreasing and u^2 is increasing, hence Cov(epsilon(U),U^2)<=0
rows.proof_boundary: Uses the already-proved pointwise monotonicity of every higher theta-summand ratio.

rows.claim: The lambda=-100 dominance theorem transfers uniformly through the complete heat interval to lambda zero.
rows.proof_boundary: Relative moment dominance only; no Hankel sign or curvature conclusion.

rows.claim: At lambda zero, every complete moment from index 300 onward differs from its first theta summand by at most two inverse sixth powers relatively.
rows.proof_boundary: All-index lambda-zero coefficient dominance; not a determinant-sign theorem.

rows.claim: At the first unproved lambda-zero order-four index and beyond, the complete-kernel logarithmic penalty differs from the first-summand penalty by at most two-fifths inverse square.

diagnostics.splice: lambda=0 prefix ends at n=500; tail starts at n=501, k=n+3=504

rows.proof_boundary: Exact Lipschitz transfer only; the first-summand curvature ceiling remains open.

rows.claim: Prove a uniform lambda-zero first-summand stable-gap curvature ceiling from the real tent boundary t=503 onward.
rows.proof_boundary: Open first-summand analytic theorem; no lambda-zero all-shift order-four conclusion is asserted.

status: exact heat-parameter dominance transfer with open lambda-zero curvature tail
